query:
INSERT INTO website_variables (
            website_id, key, value, value_type, source
        ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'manual')
        ON CONFLICT (website_id, key) DO UPDATE SET
            value = $3,
            value_type = $4,
            source = 'manual',
            stale = FALSE,
            updated_at = NOW()
        RETURNING id
